nasb.text: So all of Benjamin who fell that day were 25,000 men who draw the sword; all these were valiant warriors.

esv.text: So all who fell that day of Benjamin were 25,000 men who drew the sword, all of them men of valor.

cnv.text: 所以那一天便雅憫人倒斃的，共有二萬五千人，都是拿刀的，全部是勇士。

ccb.text: 那天，便雅悯人共死了两万五千名英勇的刀兵，
